title: More Offhand
description: Allows for more items to be shift-clicked to your offhand, other than only the shield.
body:
hi
yknow how in your inventory **you can only shift-click your shield to the offhand slot?**

that's pretty boring isn't it?

**wish you could do the same for more items?**

then this mod is for you

the mod allows you to shift-click more items to the offhand slot.

**what items?**

any! just open the config and add the items you want!



<details>
<summary>please click this</summary>

this is my first mod please use it i'll be really happy if you did and i'd also give you a hug if you want

</details>
